description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet with a light wood finish and three spacious drawers stacked vertically. The front face features clean, flat drawer fronts with subtle horizontal grooves serving as recessed handles, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The sides and top are smooth and unadorned, with a consistent light beige wood grain texture. The base is slightly recessed and appears to be a darker wood or laminate, providing a subtle contrast to the main body. The cabinet is likely constructed from engineered wood or MDF, commonly used in office and home furniture for durability and cost-effectiveness. There are no visible label holders or lock mechanisms, emphasizing its streamlined design for general storage use.
description: A light wood, three-drawer filing cabinet with a minimalist, handle-less design and a recessed dark base.
description_view_0: Front view showing three flat-front drawers with recessed grooves as handles and a contrasting dark base.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a smooth, uninterrupted wood surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, flat wood panel with no openings or hardware.
description_view_3: Right side view, identical to the left, with a smooth, featureless wood surface.
